title: gibasis heterophylla
intro: Gibasis heterophylla, also known as Mexican chia or wild chia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gibasis heterophylla include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its seeds can be ground into a flour for use in food and beverages.
